context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles DST transitions. November 1, 2026 is the day DST ends. At 7 AM local, clocks have already fallen back, so Pacific Standard Time (UTC-8) applies. The correct UTC time is 15:00.

checklist.name: Correct UTC time after DST fallback
checklist.description: Departure time is 15:00 UTC. On Nov 1 2026 at 7 AM, DST has ended (clocks fell back at 2 AM), so PST (UTC-8) applies: 07:00 + 8 = 15:00 UTC. Using PDT (UTC-7) giving 14:00 is WRONG.

checklist.name: San Carlos as KSQL
checklist.description: Uses KSQL as the origin airport code

checklist.name: Denver as KBJC
checklist.description: Uses KBJC as the destination airport code

checklist.name: DST reasoning explained
checklist.description: Notes file explains that DST has ended by 7 AM on Nov 1, so PST applies
